screen_metadata.name: Multi-Tenant Access Governance & Role-Based Security Hub

1_screen_definitions.viewport_target: Desktop Optimized (1440px dense security control console interface layout)
1_screen_definitions.main_layout_template: Three-Pane Matrix Viewport Layout (Left Navigation Sidebar Panel: Filterable Enterprise Corporate Roles Tree and Multi-Tenant Clearance Directories; Center Broad Workspace Panel: High-Density Relational Resource Permissions Grid Matrix mapping individual microservice paths to CRUD privilege toggles; Right Contextual Sidebar Panel: OAuth2 Security Profiles Token Lifetime Settings and Cryptographic Signature Key Rotators)

responsive_breakpoints.desktop: min-width: 1280px (Maintains parallel structural role directories and full permission matrix worksheets side-by-side cleanly)
responsive_breakpoints.tablet_landscape: 1024px - 1279px (The left corporate roles tree collapses down into an expandable sliding left track container to preserve horizontal space for dense permissions columns grids maps)

key_visible_sections.title: Resource Paths CRUD Privileges Matrix Grid
Tenant Identity Provider & Token Rule Configurations

user_progression_routes.on_load: Verify active system infrastructure architect or security officer super-tokens -> Inherit global multi-tenant localization context codes -> Execute state request payload fetch from SecurityGovernanceService.getSecurityRoles()
user_progression_routes.on_role_select: Asynchronously query internal resource route exceptions maps to fill the center permissions grid sheet with active/inactive state matrices indicators

redirection_rules.condition: If an active system role modifications action breaks baseline administrative security policies (e.g., attempting to evict all global Root Super-Admins from a tenant partition)
redirection_rules.action: Intercept updates pipelines instantly, pop up high-priority screen warning 'Security Protocol Invariant Mismatch', lock layout inputs, and freeze save commands triggers

modal_and_drawer_overlays.trigger: User strikes action command key rotator selector link 'btn_rotate_cryptographic_keys'
modal_and_drawer_overlays.behavior: Pop center dialogue security wizard form requesting hardware security token signatures before executing dynamic JWT signature key rotations routines on backends

atoms.type: Functional Core Action Core Button Element

molecules.composition: Combines system shield authority icon token + unique role code string identifier (e.g., ROLE_FINANCE_CONTROLLER) + scoped multi-tenant allocation metadata tag + inline inherited permission label text

Combines secure API endpoint path monospace string layout (e.g., /api/v1/finance/ledger/post) + service domain origin badge label + four separate instances of toggle_permission_switch representing CREATE, READ, UPDATE, DELETE rules

organisms.composition: High-density recursive list tree layout streaming active multi-tenant authorization profiles, handling immediate filtering actions and priority level bindings.

High-performance virtual scrolling spreadsheet grid canvas nesting rows item elements instances of resource_path_privilege_row molecules structures, complete with select-all-columns master headers overrides buttons.

typography_tokens.font_family_stack: Inter UI, system-ui, sans-serif (Precision monospaced fonts stack used strictly on endpoint routes paths strings, role keys tokens, cryptographic hash fields, and timeout numbers rows to verify grid layouts alignments balances flawlessly)

scales.security_workspace_title: font-size: 1.25rem (20px) | font-weight: 700 | tracking: tight text-transform regular
scales.api_route_mono_text: font-size: 0.8125rem (13px) | font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace | font-weight: 500 | color: slate-gray-bright

color_palette_hex.background_canvas_base: #0B0F19 (Deep Obsidian Enterprise Tech Dark Mode Base Layout Grid Frame)
color_palette_hex.surface_panels_elevated: #1E293B (Slate Matrix Boundary Panel Grid Workspace Layer Container)
color_palette_hex.security_anchor_blue: #2563EB (Royal Blue Access Governance Domain Anchor Primary Focus Hue)
color_palette_hex.permissions_active_blue: #3B82F6 (Corporate Light Blue Active Permission Authorization Switch Token Fill)
color_palette_hex.security_breach_crimson: #EF4444 (Crimson Red Policy Violation Out-Of-Bounds Alert Flash Glow Border)

spacing_and_borders.standard_padding_unit: 1rem (16px standard system-wide section partition boundary padding unit metrics parameters)
spacing_and_borders.permissions_row_gap_density: 0.375rem (6px dense spreadsheet format padding layout units dividing configuration tracks)
spacing_and_borders.border_style_token: 1px solid #334155 (Slate Matrix Border Alignment Configuration Component Framework Partition Separators)

global_application_context_bindings.active_selected_legal_entity_id: Shared enterprise system global multi-tenant business scope token variable controlling schema isolation domain values cross microservice runtime executions
global_application_context_bindings.auth_global_token_blacklist_cache: Shared infrastructure cache array capturing revoked session hashes asynchronously across clusters networks to force immediate browser user evictions on access denials flags updates

8_technical_requirements.frontend_technical_constraints: Vanilla HTML5 presentation layers combined with standard Tailwind CSS utility grid structures writing layout variables logic natively via modern ES6 client-side asynchronous module scripts executing zero compiler dependencies scripts or heavy external configurations arrays mapping scripts packages layers
8_technical_requirements.performance_benchmarks: Toggling permission switches arrays models parameters or rendering full list filters switches across a 500 API endpoint resource paths grid sheet table must re-evaluate DOM configurations frames under an execution ceiling threshold boundary value target metric of 11ms

Flip state tracking variable flag configuration is_key_rotation_wizard_visible parameter modifier value to true to present layout key generation wizard overlays dialogue canvas frames instantly
